name: cloudiqus-skills
description: End-to-end skills, commands and plugins for CloudiQS — AWS Advanced Consulting Partner. 59 skills, 40 commands, 8 plugins covering opportunity chain, AWS funding, Agentic AI SOW, FinOps, delivery, and Agent Bakery GTM.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-toolkit
plugins.description: Foundation — North Star, autonomy rules, lessons, customer context, ACE lifecycle, AI consulting identity.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-outreach
plugins.description: SDR & discovery — cold email, LinkedIn sequences, target research, VMware angle, persona library.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-commercial
plugins.description: Sales & SOW — opportunity chain, PAIN qualify, alliance motion, Agentic AI SOW, pricing, pipeline.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-delivery
plugins.description: Technical delivery — FinOps, WAFR, security, migration, onboarding, MSP, incident response.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-aws-funding
plugins.description: AWS funding — MAP, POC credits, WAFR credits, MDF, Activate, BOX feasibility.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-intelligence
plugins.description: Market intel — company research, sector analysis, competitor map, buying signals.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-ops
plugins.description: Operations — health score, MSP reporting, renewal playbook, churn detection, partner scorecard.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-agent-bakery
plugins.description: Agent Bakery GTM — AgentCore, Quick Suite catalogue, POC motion, StoreFront, governance.
